title: Insufficient evidence to assess auth implementation correctness
expectedBehavior: Sufficient documentation should be available to verify the auth implementation.
observedBehavior: Three referenced documents (security.md, api.md, db-schema.md) are missing; validateJwt and verifyPermissions are stubs.

deterministicFacts.statement: The README references three documents not in the bundle.
The implementation stubs out validation and permission functions.

inference: Without the referenced documents the correctness of the auth implementation cannot be assessed.
